task_title: NS-004: Namespace API endpoints — 6 handlers + tests + ListProjectsByNamespace
task_criteria: GET /api/v1/namespaces returns list of all namespaces with empty array for zero results
POST /api/v1/namespaces creates a new namespace, validates id and weight > 0, returns 409 on duplicate
GET /api/v1/namespaces/{id} returns a single namespace, 404 if not found
PUT /api/v1/namespaces/{id} updates namespace via NamespacePatch, 404 if not found
GET /api/v1/namespaces/{id}/projects returns projects in namespace via ListProjectsByNamespace
POST /api/v1/namespaces/{id}/move moves a project to namespace via UpdateProject with NamespaceID
internal/database/projects.go has ListProjectsByNamespace function querying WHERE namespace_id = ?
11 tests in namespace_handlers_test.go covering all handlers and edge cases
go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./internal/api/... -count=1 -short all pass
